{{wiktionary|Nara|nara}} '''Nara''' or '''Na-ra''' may refer to:
{{tocright}} == Places and jurisdictions == * {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}, a prefecture of Japan ** {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara (city)}}, the capital city of Nara Prefecture, Japan * Nara, an ancient Roman city in Tunisia, now called {{ill|Bir El Hafey|en|Bir El Hafey|WD=Q2737160|lt=Bir El Hafey}} * {{ill|Nara, Attock|en|Nara, Attock|WD=Q6965222|lt=Nara, Attock}}, a village in Attock, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Jhelum|en|Nara, Jhelum|WD=Q6965223|lt=Nara, Jhelum}}, a village in Jhelum, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara Matore|Nara Matore]], a village in Kahuta Tehsil, Rawalpindi District, Punjab, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa|Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa]], a Union Council of Abbottabad, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Mali|en|Nara, Mali|WD=Q937352|lt=Nara, Mali}}, a town in Mali * {{ill|Nara Basin|en|Nara Basin|WD=Q10942269|lt=Nara Basin}}, a valley in Nara Prefecture, Japan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal}}, an excavated waterway in Sindh province, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal}}, a paleochannel of the Indus and the Hakra, partly used by the Nara Canal * {{ill|Nara (Oka)|en|Nara (Oka)|WD=Q630567|lt=Nara (Oka)}}, a river in Russia * {{ill|Nara River (India)|en|Nara River (India)|WD=Q6965239|lt=Nara River (India)}}, a river in Gujarat, India * {{ill|Nara Burnu|en|Nara Burnu|WD=Q6010478|lt=Nara Burnu}}, a cape in Turkey
== People and society == * {{ill|Nara people|en|Nara people|WD=Q1778995|lt=Nara people}}, a Nilotic ethnic minority inhabiting Eritrea * {{ill|Nara language|en|Nara language|WD=Q36179|lt=Nara language}}, the mother tongue of the Nara people * {{ill|Nara clan|en|Nara clan|WD=Q10801964|lt=Nara clan}}, a Manchu clan in China * {{ill|National Radical Camp|en|National Radical Camp|WD=Q210671|lt=National Radical Camp}} or Nara Party, several Polish nationalist groups
== People with the name Nara == ===Given name=== * {{ill|Nara Nath Acharya|en|Nara Nath Acharya|WD=Q6965238|lt=Nara Nath Acharya}} (1906–1988), Nepalese poet * {{ill|Nara Apaya|en|Nara Apaya|WD=Q16873158|lt=Nara Apaya}}, king of the Mrauk-U Dynasty of Arakan * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Bista|en|Nara Bahadur Bista|WD=Q16190160|lt=Nara Bahadur Bista}}, Nepalese politician * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Dahal|en|Nara Bahadur Dahal|WD=Q43252542|lt=Nara Bahadur Dahal}} (born 1960), Nepalese long-distance runner * {{ill|Nara Falcón|en|Nara Falcón|WD=Q19975851|lt=Nara Falcón}} (born 1981), Mexican synchronized swimmer * {{ill|Jang Na-ra|en|Jang Na-ra|WD=Q494190|lt=Jang Na-ra}} (born 1981), South Korean female singer * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|en|Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|WD=Q16190635|lt=Nara Bahadur Karmacharya}}, Nepalese politician * {{ill|Nara Kollery|en|Nara Kollery|WD=Q13112868|lt=Nara Kollery}} (died 2015), Indian sound recordist * {{ill|Kwon Nara|en|Kwon Nara|WD=Q14493927|lt=Kwon Nara}} (born 1991), South Korean female singer * {{ill|Nara Leão|en|Nara Leão|WD=Q940848|lt=Nara Leão}} (1942–1989), Brazilian female singer * {{ill|Nara Lokesh|en|Nara Lokesh|WD=Q13561072|lt=Nara Lokesh}} (born 1983), Indian male politician * [[:en:Nara Rohit|Nara Rohit]] (born 1984), Indian film actor and producer * {{ill|Nara Bhupal Shah|en|Nara Bhupal Shah|WD=Q6965226|lt=Nara Bhupal Shah}} (1697–1743), king of the Gorkha state in Nepal
===Surname=== * {{ill|Erika Nara|en|Erika Nara|WD=Q5388998|lt=Erika Nara}}, Japanese Paralympic swimmer * {{ill|Kurumi Nara|en|Kurumi Nara|WD=Q270125|lt=Kurumi Nara}} (born 1991), Japanese tennis player * {{ill|Rao Nara|en|Rao Nara|WD=Q16863396|lt=Rao Nara}} (1420–1487), crown Prince of Nadol, India *{{Nihongo|{{ill|Setsuo Nara|en|Setsuo Nara|WD=Q11445421|lt=Setsuo Nara}}|奈良 節雄||born 1936}}, Japanese basketball player * {{ill|Takeji Nara|en|Takeji Nara|WD=Q1129969|lt=Takeji Nara}} (1868–1962), general in the Imperial Japanese Army * {{ill|Tatsuki Nara|en|Tatsuki Nara|WD=Q7688283|lt=Tatsuki Nara}} (born 1993), Japanese footballer * {{ill|Tatunca Nara|en|Tatunca Nara|WD=Q121015|lt=Tatunca Nara}} (born 1941), German-Brazilian jungle guide who invented the lost city of Akakor * {{ill|Tōru Nara|en|Tōru Nara|WD=Q7862714|lt=Tōru Nara}}, Japanese voice actor * {{ill|Wanda Nara|en|Wanda Nara|WD=Q7967127|lt=Wanda Nara}} (born 1986), Argentine media personality and football agent * {{ill|Yoshitomo Nara|en|Yoshitomo Nara|WD=Q2015324|lt=Yoshitomo Nara}} (born 1959), Japanese artist * {{ill|Zaira Nara|en|Zaira Nara|WD=Q3574627|lt=Zaira Nara}} (born 1988), Argentine model and TV host * {{ill|Empress Xiaojingxian|en|Empress Xiaojingxian|WD=Q1036533|lt=Ula Nara Duoqimuli}}, Empress consort of Qing dynasty Yongzheng Emperor
== Arts and mythology == * [[:en:Nara (Arjuna)|Nara (Arjuna)]], Arjuna in his previous birth was Nara * ''{{ill|Nara (album)|en|Nara (album)|WD=Q131394713|lt=Nara (album)}}'', by Emily Wurramara * {{ill|Nara (comics)|en|Nara (comics)|WD=Q17012003|lt=Nara (comics)}}, a fictional character from Marvel Comics * One of the twins {{ill|Nara-Narayana|en|Nara-Narayana|WD=Q2472959|lt=Nara-Narayana}} in Hindu mythology * "Nara", song from the album ''Unearthed'' by {{ill|E.S. Posthumus|en|E.S. Posthumus|WD=Q1273595|lt=E.S. Posthumus}} * {{ill|Shikamaru Nara|en|Shikamaru Nara|WD=Q30334|lt=Shikamaru Nara}}, fictional character in the manga and anime series ''Naruto'' * "Nara", "Arrival In Nara" and "Leaving Nara", songs from the 2014 album ''{{ill|This Is All Yours|en|This Is All Yours|WD=Q17300078|lt=This Is All Yours}}'' by alt-J
== Other uses == * {{ill|Nara Hotel|en|Nara Hotel|WD=Q6965236|lt=Nara Hotel}}, a hotel in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Station|en|Nara Station|WD=Q1150978|lt=Nara Station}}, a railway station in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Television|en|Nara Television|WD=Q6134207|lt=Nara Television}}, a Japanese television and radio broadcaster headquartered in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara University|en|Nara University|WD=Q8190036|lt=Nara University}}, a private university in Misasagi-cho, Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Women's University|en|Nara Women's University|WD=Q1148082|lt=Nara Women's University}}, a national university in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}, period of Japanese history, named after the former capital city * {{ill|Japanese ship Nara|en|Japanese ship Nara|WD=Q18128510|lt=Japanese ship ''Nara''}}, {{Nihongo||楢 / なら||"oak"}}, several Japanese ships * [[:en:Nara plant|Nara plant]] (''{{ill|Acanthosicyos horridus|en|Acanthosicyos horridus|WD=Q1707437|lt=Acanthosicyos horridus}}''), a melon species of the Namib desert
== NARA as an acronym == '''NARA''' may stand for: * {{ill|National Alien Registration Authority|en|National Alien Registration Authority|WD=Q16961805|lt=National Alien Registration Authority}}, a defunct agency of the Government of Pakistan * {{ill|National Amateur Rowing Association|en|National Amateur Rowing Association|WD=Q6970336|lt=National Amateur Rowing Association}}, the governing body for rowing by working men in Britain prior to 1956 * {{ill|National Archives and Records Administration|en|National Archives and Records Administration|WD=Q518155|lt=National Archives and Records Administration}}, an agency of the U.S. government * {{ill|Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|en|Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|WD=Q5664463|lt=Neale Analysis of Reading Ability}}, an assessment of comprehension and word reading accuracy
==See also== * [[:en:Narra (disambiguation)|Narra (disambiguation)]] * {{ill|Naro (disambiguation)|en|Naro (disambiguation)|WD=Q353870|lt=Naro (disambiguation)}} * [[:en:Nari (disambiguation)|Nari (disambiguation)]]

{{wiktionary|Nara|nara}} '''Nara''' or '''Na-ra''' may refer to:
{{tocright}} == Places and jurisdictions == * {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}, a prefecture of Japan ** {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara (city)}}, the capital city of Nara Prefecture, Japan * Nara, an ancient Roman city in Tunisia, now called {{ill|Bir El Hafey|en|Bir El Hafey|WD=Q2737160|lt=Bir El Hafey}} * {{ill|Nara, Attock|en|Nara, Attock|WD=Q6965222|lt=Nara, Attock}}, a village in Attock, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Jhelum|en|Nara, Jhelum|WD=Q6965223|lt=Nara, Jhelum}}, a village in Jhelum, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara Matore|Nara Matore]], a village in Kahuta Tehsil, Rawalpindi District, Punjab, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa|Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa]], a Union Council of Abbottabad, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Mali|en|Nara, Mali|WD=Q937352|lt=Nara, Mali}}, a town in Mali * {{ill|Nara Basin|en|Nara Basin|WD=Q10942269|lt=Nara Basin}}, a valley in Nara Prefecture, Japan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal}}, an excavated waterway in Sindh province, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal}}, a paleochannel of the Indus and the Hakra, partly used by the Nara Canal * {{ill|Nara (Oka)|en|Nara (Oka)|WD=Q630567|lt=Nara (Oka)}}, a river in Russia * {{ill|Nara River (India)|en|Nara River (India)|WD=Q6965239|lt=Nara River (India)}}, a river in Gujarat, India * {{ill|Nara Burnu|en|Nara Burnu|WD=Q6010478|lt=Nara Burnu}}, a cape in Turkey
== People and society == * {{ill|Nara people|en|Nara people|WD=Q1778995|lt=Nara people}}, a Nilotic ethnic minority inhabiting Eritrea * {{ill|Nara language|en|Nara language|WD=Q36179|lt=Nara language}}, the mother tongue of the Nara people * {{ill|Nara clan|en|Nara clan|WD=Q10801964|lt=Nara clan}}, a Manchu clan in China * {{ill|National Radical Camp|en|National Radical Camp|WD=Q210671|lt=National Radical Camp}} or Nara Party, several Polish nationalist groups
== People with the name Nara == ===Given name=== * {{ill|Nara Nath Acharya|en|Nara Nath Acharya|WD=Q6965238|lt=Nara Nath Acharya}} (1906–1988), Nepalese poet * {{ill|Nara Apaya|en|Nara Apaya|WD=Q16873158|lt=Nara Apaya}}, king of the Mrauk-U Dynasty of Arakan * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Bista|en|Nara Bahadur Bista|WD=Q16190160|lt=Nara Bahadur Bista}}, Nepalese politician * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Dahal|en|Nara Bahadur Dahal|WD=Q43252542|lt=Nara Bahadur Dahal}} (born 1960), Nepalese long-distance runner * {{ill|Nara Falcón|en|Nara Falcón|WD=Q19975851|lt=Nara Falcón}} (born 1981), Mexican synchronized swimmer * {{ill|Jang Na-ra|en|Jang Na-ra|WD=Q494190|lt=Jang Na-ra}} (born 1981), South Korean female singer * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|en|Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|WD=Q16190635|lt=Nara Bahadur Karmacharya}}, Nepalese politician * {{ill|Nara Kollery|en|Nara Kollery|WD=Q13112868|lt=Nara Kollery}} (died 2015), Indian sound recordist * {{ill|Kwon Nara|en|Kwon Nara|WD=Q14493927|lt=Kwon Nara}} (born 1991), South Korean female singer * {{ill|Nara Leão|en|Nara Leão|WD=Q940848|lt=Nara Leão}} (1942–1989), Brazilian female singer * {{ill|Nara Lokesh|en|Nara Lokesh|WD=Q13561072|lt=Nara Lokesh}} (born 1983), Indian male politician * [[:en:Nara Rohit|Nara Rohit]] (born 1984), Indian film actor and producer * {{ill|Nara Bhupal Shah|en|Nara Bhupal Shah|WD=Q6965226|lt=Nara Bhupal Shah}} (1697–1743), king of the Gorkha state in Nepal
===Surname=== * {{ill|Erika Nara|en|Erika Nara|WD=Q5388998|lt=Erika Nara}}, Japanese Paralympic swimmer * {{ill|Kurumi Nara|en|Kurumi Nara|WD=Q270125|lt=Kurumi Nara}} (born 1991), Japanese tennis player * {{ill|Rao Nara|en|Rao Nara|WD=Q16863396|lt=Rao Nara}} (1420–1487), crown Prince of Nadol, India *{{Nihongo|{{ill|Setsuo Nara|en|Setsuo Nara|WD=Q11445421|lt=Setsuo Nara}}|奈良 節雄||born 1936}}, Japanese basketball player * {{ill|Takeji Nara|en|Takeji Nara|WD=Q1129969|lt=Takeji Nara}} (1868–1962), general in the Imperial Japanese Army * {{ill|Tatsuki Nara|en|Tatsuki Nara|WD=Q7688283|lt=Tatsuki Nara}} (born 1993), Japanese footballer * {{ill|Tatunca Nara|en|Tatunca Nara|WD=Q121015|lt=Tatunca Nara}} (born 1941), German-Brazilian jungle guide who invented the lost city of Akakor * {{ill|Tōru Nara|en|Tōru Nara|WD=Q7862714|lt=Tōru Nara}}, Japanese voice actor * {{ill|Wanda Nara|en|Wanda Nara|WD=Q7967127|lt=Wanda Nara}} (born 1986), Argentine media personality and football agent * {{ill|Yoshitomo Nara|en|Yoshitomo Nara|WD=Q2015324|lt=Yoshitomo Nara}} (born 1959), Japanese artist * {{ill|Zaira Nara|en|Zaira Nara|WD=Q3574627|lt=Zaira Nara}} (born 1988), Argentine model and TV host * {{ill|Empress Xiaojingxian|en|Empress Xiaojingxian|WD=Q1036533|lt=Ula Nara Duoqimuli}}, Empress consort of Qing dynasty Yongzheng Emperor

Posthumus}} * {{ill|Shikamaru Nara|en|Shikamaru Nara|WD=Q30334|lt=Shikamaru Nara}}, fictional character in the manga and anime series ''Naruto'' * "Nara", "Arrival In Nara" and "Leaving Nara", songs from the 2014 album ''{{ill|This Is All Yours|en|This Is All Yours|WD=Q17300078|lt=This Is All Yours}}'' by alt-J
== Other uses == * {{ill|Nara Hotel|en|Nara Hotel|WD=Q6965236|lt=Nara Hotel}}, a hotel in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Station|en|Nara Station|WD=Q1150978|lt=Nara Station}}, a railway station in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Television|en|Nara Television|WD=Q6134207|lt=Nara Television}}, a Japanese television and radio broadcaster headquartered in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara University|en|Nara University|WD=Q8190036|lt=Nara University}}, a private university in Misasagi-cho, Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Women's University|en|Nara Women's University|WD=Q1148082|lt=Nara Women's University}}, a national university in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}, period of Japanese history, named after the former capital city * {{ill|Japanese ship Nara|en|Japanese ship Nara|WD=Q18128510|lt=Japanese ship ''Nara''}}, {{Nihongo||楢 / なら||"oak"}}, several Japanese ships * [[:en:Nara plant|Nara plant]] (''{{ill|Acanthosicyos horridus|en|Acanthosicyos horridus|WD=Q1707437|lt=Acanthosicyos horridus}}''), a melon species of the Namib desert
== NARA as an acronym == '''NARA''' may stand for: * {{ill|National Alien Registration Authority|en|National Alien Registration Authority|WD=Q16961805|lt=National Alien Registration Authority}}, a defunct agency of the Government of Pakistan * {{ill|National Amateur Rowing Association|en|National Amateur Rowing Association|WD=Q6970336|lt=National Amateur Rowing Association}}, the governing body for rowing by working men in Britain prior to 1956 * {{ill|National Archives and Records Administration|en|National Archives and Records Administration|WD=Q518155|lt=National Archives and Records Administration}}, an agency of the U.S. government * {{ill|Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|en|Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|WD=Q5664463|lt=Neale Analysis of Reading Ability}}, an assessment of comprehension and word reading accuracy

{{wiktionary|Nara|nara}} '''Nara''' or '''Na-ra''' may refer to:
{{tocright}} == Places and jurisdictions == * {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}, a prefecture of Japan ** {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara (city)|1=Nara (city)}}, the capital city of Nara Prefecture, Japan * Nara, an ancient Roman city in Tunisia, now called {{ill|Bir El Hafey|en|Bir El Hafey|WD=Q2737160|lt=Bir El Hafey|1=Bir El Hafey}} * {{ill|Nara, Attock|en|Nara, Attock|WD=Q6965222|lt=Nara, Attock|1=Nara, Attock}}, a village in Attock, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Jhelum|en|Nara, Jhelum|WD=Q6965223|lt=Nara, Jhelum|1=Nara, Jhelum}}, a village in Jhelum, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara Matore|Nara Matore]], a village in Kahuta Tehsil, Rawalpindi District, Punjab, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa|Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa]], a Union Council of Abbottabad, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Mali|en|Nara, Mali|WD=Q937352|lt=Nara, Mali|1=Nara, Mali}}, a town in Mali * {{ill|Nara Basin|en|Nara Basin|WD=Q10942269|lt=Nara Basin|1=Nara Basin}}, a valley in Nara Prefecture, Japan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal|1=Nara Canal}}, an excavated waterway in Sindh province, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal|1=Nara Canal}}, a paleochannel of the Indus and the Hakra, partly used by the Nara Canal * {{ill|Nara (Oka)|en|Nara (Oka)|WD=Q630567|lt=Nara (Oka)|1=Nara (Oka)}}, a river in Russia * {{ill|Nara River (India)|en|Nara River (India)|WD=Q6965239|lt=Nara River (India)|1=Nara River (India)}}, a river in Gujarat, India * {{ill|Nara Burnu|en|Nara Burnu|WD=Q6010478|lt=Nara Burnu|1=Nara Burnu}}, a cape in Turkey
== People and society == * {{ill|Nara people|en|Nara people|WD=Q1778995|lt=Nara people|1=Nara people}}, a Nilotic ethnic minority inhabiting Eritrea * {{ill|Nara language|en|Nara language|WD=Q36179|lt=Nara language|1=Nara language}}, the mother tongue of the Nara people * {{ill|Nara clan|en|Nara clan|WD=Q10801964|lt=Nara clan|1=Nara clan}}, a Manchu clan in China * {{ill|National Radical Camp|en|National Radical Camp|WD=Q210671|lt=National Radical Camp|1=National Radical Camp}} or Nara Party, several Polish nationalist groups
== People with the name Nara == ===Given name=== * {{ill|Nara Nath Acharya|en|Nara Nath Acharya|WD=Q6965238|lt=Nara Nath Acharya|1=Nara Nath Acharya}} (1906–1988), Nepalese poet * {{ill|Nara Apaya|en|Nara Apaya|WD=Q16873158|lt=Nara Apaya|1=Nara Apaya}}, king of the Mrauk-U Dynasty of Arakan * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Bista|en|Nara Bahadur Bista|WD=Q16190160|lt=Nara Bahadur Bista|1=Nara Bahadur Bista}}, Nepalese politician * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Dahal|en|Nara Bahadur Dahal|WD=Q43252542|lt=Nara Bahadur Dahal|1=Nara Bahadur Dahal}} (born 1960), Nepalese long-distance runner * {{ill|Nara Falcón|en|Nara Falcón|WD=Q19975851|lt=Nara Falcón|1=Nara Falcón}} (born 1981), Mexican synchronized swimmer * {{ill|Jang Na-ra|en|Jang Na-ra|WD=Q494190|lt=Jang Na-ra|1=Jang Na-ra}} (born 1981), South Korean female singer * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|en|Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|WD=Q16190635|lt=Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|1=Nara Bahadur Karmacharya}}, Nepalese politician * {{ill|Nara Kollery|en|Nara Kollery|WD=Q13112868|lt=Nara Kollery|1=Nara Kollery}} (died 2015), Indian sound recordist * {{ill|Kwon Nara|en|Kwon Nara|WD=Q14493927|lt=Kwon Nara|1=Kwon Nara}} (born 1991), South Korean female singer * {{ill|Nara Leão|en|Nara Leão|WD=Q940848|lt=Nara Leão|1=Nara Leão}} (1942–1989), Brazilian female singer * {{ill|Nara Lokesh|en|Nara Lokesh|WD=Q13561072|lt=Nara Lokesh|1=Nara Lokesh}} (born 1983), Indian male politician * [[:en:Nara Rohit|Nara Rohit]] (born 1984), Indian film actor and producer * {{ill|Nara Bhupal Shah|en|Nara Bhupal Shah|WD=Q6965226|lt=Nara Bhupal Shah|1=Nara Bhupal Shah}} (1697–1743), king of the Gorkha state in Nepal
===Surname=== * {{ill|Erika Nara|en|Erika Nara|WD=Q5388998|lt=Erika Nara|1=Erika Nara}}, Japanese Paralympic swimmer * {{ill|Kurumi Nara|en|Kurumi Nara|WD=Q270125|lt=Kurumi Nara|1=Kurumi Nara}} (born 1991), Japanese tennis player * {{ill|Rao Nara|en|Rao Nara|WD=Q16863396|lt=Rao Nara|1=Rao Nara}} (1420–1487), crown Prince of Nadol, India *{{Nihongo|{{ill|Setsuo Nara|en|Setsuo Nara|WD=Q11445421|lt=Setsuo Nara|1=Setsuo Nara}}|奈良 節雄||born 1936}}, Japanese basketball player * {{ill|Takeji Nara|en|Takeji Nara|WD=Q1129969|lt=Takeji Nara|1=Takeji Nara}} (1868–1962), general in the Imperial Japanese Army * {{ill|Tatsuki Nara|en|Tatsuki Nara|WD=Q7688283|lt=Tatsuki Nara|1=Tatsuki Nara}} (born 1993), Japanese footballer * {{ill|Tatunca Nara|en|Tatunca Nara|WD=Q121015|lt=Tatunca Nara|1=Tatunca Nara}} (born 1941), German-Brazilian jungle guide who invented the lost city of Akakor * {{ill|Tōru Nara|en|Tōru Nara|WD=Q7862714|lt=Tōru Nara|1=Tōru Nara}}, Japanese voice actor * {{ill|Wanda Nara|en|Wanda Nara|WD=Q7967127|lt=Wanda Nara|1=Wanda Nara}} (born 1986), Argentine media personality and football agent * {{ill|Yoshitomo Nara|en|Yoshitomo Nara|WD=Q2015324|lt=Yoshitomo Nara|1=Yoshitomo Nara}} (born 1959), Japanese artist * {{ill|Zaira Nara|en|Zaira Nara|WD=Q3574627|lt=Zaira Nara|1=Zaira Nara}} (born 1988), Argentine model and TV host * {{ill|Empress Xiaojingxian|en|Empress Xiaojingxian|WD=Q1036533|lt=Ula Nara Duoqimuli|1=Empress Xiaojingxian}}, Empress consort of Qing dynasty Yongzheng Emperor
== Arts and mythology == * [[:en:Nara (Arjuna)|Nara (Arjuna)]], Arjuna in his previous birth was Nara * ''{{ill|Nara (album)|en|Nara (album)|WD=Q131394713|lt=Nara (album)|1=Nara (album)}}'', by Emily Wurramara * {{ill|Nara (comics)|en|Nara (comics)|WD=Q17012003|lt=Nara (comics)|1=Nara (comics)}}, a fictional character from Marvel Comics * One of the twins {{ill|Nara-Narayana|en|Nara-Narayana|WD=Q2472959|lt=Nara-Narayana|1=Nara-Narayana}} in Hindu mythology * "Nara", song from the album ''Unearthed'' by {{ill|E.S. Posthumus|en|E.S. Posthumus|WD=Q1273595|lt=E.S. Posthumus|1=E.S. Posthumus}} * {{ill|Shikamaru Nara|en|Shikamaru Nara|WD=Q30334|lt=Shikamaru Nara|1=Shikamaru Nara}}, fictional character in the manga and anime series ''Naruto'' * "Nara", "Arrival In Nara" and "Leaving Nara", songs from the 2014 album ''{{ill|This Is All Yours|en|This Is All Yours|WD=Q17300078|lt=This Is All Yours|1=This Is All Yours}}'' by alt-J
== Other uses == * {{ill|Nara Hotel|en|Nara Hotel|WD=Q6965236|lt=Nara Hotel|1=Nara Hotel}}, a hotel in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Station|en|Nara Station|WD=Q1150978|lt=Nara Station|1=Nara Station}}, a railway station in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Television|en|Nara Television|WD=Q6134207|lt=Nara Television|1=Nara Television}}, a Japanese television and radio broadcaster headquartered in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara University|en|Nara University|WD=Q8190036|lt=Nara University|1=Nara University}}, a private university in Misasagi-cho, Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Women's University|en|Nara Women's University|WD=Q1148082|lt=Nara Women's University|1=Nara Women's University}}, a national university in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}, period of Japanese history, named after the former capital city * {{ill|Japanese ship Nara|en|Japanese ship Nara|WD=Q18128510|lt=Japanese ship ''Nara''|1=Japanese ship Nara}}, {{Nihongo||楢 / なら||"oak"}}, several Japanese ships * [[:en:Nara plant|Nara plant]] (''{{ill|Acanthosicyos horridus|en|Acanthosicyos horridus|WD=Q1707437|lt=Acanthosicyos horridus|1=Acanthosicyos horridus}}''), a melon species of the Namib desert
== NARA as an acronym == '''NARA''' may stand for: * {{ill|National Alien Registration Authority|en|National Alien Registration Authority|WD=Q16961805|lt=National Alien Registration Authority|1=National Alien Registration Authority}}, a defunct agency of the Government of Pakistan * {{ill|National Amateur Rowing Association|en|National Amateur Rowing Association|WD=Q6970336|lt=National Amateur Rowing Association|1=National Amateur Rowing Association}}, the governing body for rowing by working men in Britain prior to 1956 * {{ill|National Archives and Records Administration|en|National Archives and Records Administration|WD=Q518155|lt=National Archives and Records Administration|1=National Archives and Records Administration}}, an agency of the U.S. government * {{ill|Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|en|Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|WD=Q5664463|lt=Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|1=Neale Analysis of Reading Ability}}, an assessment of comprehension and word reading accuracy
==See also== * [[:en:Narra (disambiguation)|Narra (disambiguation)]] * {{ill|Naro (disambiguation)|en|Naro (disambiguation)|WD=Q353870|lt=Naro (disambiguation)|1=Naro (disambiguation)}} * [[:en:Nari (disambiguation)|Nari (disambiguation)]]

{{tocright}} == Places and jurisdictions == * {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}, a prefecture of Japan ** {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara (city)|1=Nara (city)}}, the capital city of Nara Prefecture, Japan * Nara, an ancient Roman city in Tunisia, now called {{ill|Bir El Hafey|en|Bir El Hafey|WD=Q2737160|lt=Bir El Hafey|1=Bir El Hafey}} * {{ill|Nara, Attock|en|Nara, Attock|WD=Q6965222|lt=Nara, Attock|1=Nara, Attock}}, a village in Attock, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Jhelum|en|Nara, Jhelum|WD=Q6965223|lt=Nara, Jhelum|1=Nara, Jhelum}}, a village in Jhelum, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara Matore|Nara Matore]], a village in Kahuta Tehsil, Rawalpindi District, Punjab, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa|Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa]], a Union Council of Abbottabad, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Mali|en|Nara, Mali|WD=Q937352|lt=Nara, Mali|1=Nara, Mali}}, a town in Mali * {{ill|Nara Basin|en|Nara Basin|WD=Q10942269|lt=Nara Basin|1=Nara Basin}}, a valley in Nara Prefecture, Japan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal|1=Nara Canal}}, an excavated waterway in Sindh province, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal|1=Nara Canal}}, a paleochannel of the Indus and the Hakra, partly used by the Nara Canal * {{ill|Nara (Oka)|en|Nara (Oka)|WD=Q630567|lt=Nara (Oka)|1=Nara (Oka)}}, a river in Russia * {{ill|Nara River (India)|en|Nara River (India)|WD=Q6965239|lt=Nara River (India)|1=Nara River (India)}}, a river in Gujarat, India * {{ill|Nara Burnu|en|Nara Burnu|WD=Q6010478|lt=Nara Burnu|1=Nara Burnu}}, a cape in Turkey
== People and society == * {{ill|Nara people|en|Nara people|WD=Q1778995|lt=Nara people|1=Nara people}}, a Nilotic ethnic minority inhabiting Eritrea * {{ill|Nara language|en|Nara language|WD=Q36179|lt=Nara language|1=Nara language}}, the mother tongue of the Nara people * {{ill|Nara clan|en|Nara clan|WD=Q10801964|lt=Nara clan|1=Nara clan}}, a Manchu clan in China * {{ill|National Radical Camp|en|National Radical Camp|WD=Q210671|lt=National Radical Camp|1=National Radical Camp}} or Nara Party, several Polish nationalist groups

== Other uses == * {{ill|Nara Hotel|en|Nara Hotel|WD=Q6965236|lt=Nara Hotel|1=Nara Hotel}}, a hotel in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Station|en|Nara Station|WD=Q1150978|lt=Nara Station|1=Nara Station}}, a railway station in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Television|en|Nara Television|WD=Q6134207|lt=Nara Television|1=Nara Television}}, a Japanese television and radio broadcaster headquartered in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara University|en|Nara University|WD=Q8190036|lt=Nara University|1=Nara University}}, a private university in Misasagi-cho, Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Women's University|en|Nara Women's University|WD=Q1148082|lt=Nara Women's University|1=Nara Women's University}}, a national university in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}, period of Japanese history, named after the former capital city * {{ill|Japanese ship Nara|en|Japanese ship Nara|WD=Q18128510|lt=Japanese ship ''Nara''|1=Japanese ship Nara}}, {{Nihongo||楢 / なら||"oak"}}, several Japanese ships * [[:en:Nara plant|Nara plant]] (''{{ill|Acanthosicyos horridus|en|Acanthosicyos horridus|WD=Q1707437|lt=Acanthosicyos horridus|1=Acanthosicyos horridus}}''), a melon species of the Namib desert
== NARA as an acronym == '''NARA''' may stand for: * {{ill|National Alien Registration Authority|en|National Alien Registration Authority|WD=Q16961805|lt=National Alien Registration Authority|1=National Alien Registration Authority}}, a defunct agency of the Government of Pakistan * {{ill|National Amateur Rowing Association|en|National Amateur Rowing Association|WD=Q6970336|lt=National Amateur Rowing Association|1=National Amateur Rowing Association}}, the governing body for rowing by working men in Britain prior to 1956 * {{ill|National Archives and Records Administration|en|National Archives and Records Administration|WD=Q518155|lt=National Archives and Records Administration|1=National Archives and Records Administration}}, an agency of the U.S. government * {{ill|Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|en|Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|WD=Q5664463|lt=Neale Analysis of Reading Ability|1=Neale Analysis of Reading Ability}}, an assessment of comprehension and word reading accuracy

== Other uses == * {{ill|Nara Hotel|en|Nara Hotel|WD=Q6965236|lt=Nara Hotel|1=Nara Hotel}}, a hotel in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Station|en|Nara Station|WD=Q1150978|lt=Nara Station|1=Nara Station}}, a railway station in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Television|en|Nara Television|WD=Q6134207|lt=Nara Television|1=Nara Television}}, a Japanese television and radio broadcaster headquartered in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara University|en|Nara University|WD=Q8190036|lt=Nara University|1=Nara University}}, a private university in Misasagi-cho, Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara Women's University|en|Nara Women's University|WD=Q1148082|lt=Nara Women's University|1=Nara Women's University}}, a national university in Nara, Japan * {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}, period of Japanese history, named after the former capital city * {{ill|Japanese ship Nara|en|Japanese ship Nara|WD=Q18128510|lt=Japanese ship ''Nara''|1=Japanese ship Nara}}, {{Nihongo||楢 / なら||"oak"}}, several Japanese ships * [[:en:Nara plant|Nara plant]] (''{{ill|Acanthosicyos horridus|en|Acanthosicyos horridus|WD=Q1707437|lt=Acanthosicyos horridus|1=Acanthosicyos horridus}}''), a melon species of the Namib desert

{{wiktionary|Nara|nara}} '''Nara''' or '''Na-ra''' may refer to:
{{tocright}} == Places and jurisdictions == * {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}, a prefecture of Japan ** {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara (city)|1=Nara (city)}}, the capital city of Nara Prefecture, Japan * Nara, an ancient Roman city in Tunisia, now called {{ill|Bir El Hafey|en|Bir El Hafey|WD=Q2737160|lt=Bir El Hafey|1=Bir El Hafey}} * {{ill|Nara, Attock|en|Nara, Attock|WD=Q6965222|lt=Nara, Attock|1=Nara, Attock}}, a village in Attock, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Jhelum|en|Nara, Jhelum|WD=Q6965223|lt=Nara, Jhelum|1=Nara, Jhelum}}, a village in Jhelum, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara Matore|Nara Matore]], a village in Kahuta Tehsil, Rawalpindi District, Punjab, Pakistan * [[:en:Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa|Nara, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa]], a Union Council of Abbottabad, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara, Mali|en|Nara, Mali|WD=Q937352|lt=Nara, Mali|1=Nara, Mali}}, a town in Mali * {{ill|Nara Basin|en|Nara Basin|WD=Q10942269|lt=Nara Basin|1=Nara Basin}}, a valley in Nara Prefecture, Japan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal|1=Nara Canal}}, an excavated waterway in Sindh province, Pakistan * {{ill|Nara Canal|en|Nara Canal|WD=Q6965227|lt=Nara Canal|1=Nara Canal}}, a paleochannel of the Indus and the Hakra, partly used by the Nara Canal * {{ill|Nara (Oka)|en|Nara (Oka)|WD=Q630567|lt=Nara (Oka)|1=Nara (Oka)}}, a river in Russia * {{ill|Nara River (India)|en|Nara River (India)|WD=Q6965239|lt=Nara River (India)|1=Nara River (India)}}, a river in Gujarat, India * {{ill|Nara Burnu|en|Nara Burnu|WD=Q6010478|lt=Nara Burnu|1=Nara Burnu}}, a cape in Turkey
== People and society == * {{ill|Nara people|en|Nara people|WD=Q1778995|lt=Nara people|1=Nara people}}, a Nilotic ethnic minority inhabiting Eritrea * {{ill|Nara language|en|Nara language|WD=Q36179|lt=Nara language|1=Nara language}}, the mother tongue of the Nara people * {{ill|Nara clan|en|Nara clan|WD=Q10801964|lt=Nara clan|1=Nara clan}}, a Manchu clan in China * {{ill|National Radical Camp|en|National Radical Camp|WD=Q210671|lt=National Radical Camp|1=National Radical Camp}} or Nara Party, several Polish nationalist groups
== People with the name Nara == ===Given name=== * {{ill|Nara Nath Acharya|en|Nara Nath Acharya|WD=Q6965238|lt=Nara Nath Acharya|1=Nara Nath Acharya}} (1906–1988), Nepalese poet * {{ill|Nara Apaya|en|Nara Apaya|WD=Q16873158|lt=Nara Apaya|1=Nara Apaya}}, king of the Mrauk-U Dynasty of Arakan * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Bista|en|Nara Bahadur Bista|WD=Q16190160|lt=Nara Bahadur Bista|1=Nara Bahadur Bista}}, Nepalese politician * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Dahal|en|Nara Bahadur Dahal|WD=Q43252542|lt=Nara Bahadur Dahal|1=Nara Bahadur Dahal}} (born 1960), Nepalese long-distance runner * {{ill|Nara Falcón|en|Nara Falcón|WD=Q19975851|lt=Nara Falcón|1=Nara Falcón}} (born 1981), Mexican synchronized swimmer * {{ill|Jang Na-ra|en|Jang Na-ra|WD=Q494190|lt=Jang Na-ra|1=Jang Na-ra}} (born 1981), South Korean female singer * {{ill|Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|en|Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|WD=Q16190635|lt=Nara Bahadur Karmacharya|1=Nara Bahadur Karmacharya}}, Nepalese politician * {{ill|Nara Kollery|en|Nara Kollery|WD=Q13112868|lt=Nara Kollery|1=Nara Kollery}} (died 2015), Indian sound recordist * {{ill|Kwon Nara|en|Kwon Nara|WD=Q14493927|lt=Kwon Nara|1=Kwon Nara}} (born 1991), South Korean female singer * {{ill|Nara Leão|en|Nara Leão|WD=Q940848|lt=Nara Leão|1=Nara Leão}} (1942–1989), Brazilian female singer * {{ill|Nara Lokesh|en|Nara Lokesh|WD=Q13561072|lt=Nara Lokesh|1=Nara Lokesh}} (born 1983), Indian male politician * [[:en:Nara Rohit|Nara Rohit]] (born 1984), Indian film actor and producer * {{ill|Nara Bhupal Shah|en|Nara Bhupal Shah|WD=Q6965226|lt=Nara Bhupal Shah|1=Nara Bhupal Shah}} (1697–1743), king of the Gorkha state in Nepal
===Surname=== * {{ill|Erika Nara|en|Erika Nara|WD=Q5388998|lt=Erika Nara|1=Erika Nara}}, Japanese Paralympic swimmer * {{ill|Kurumi Nara|en|Kurumi Nara|WD=Q270125|lt=Kurumi Nara|1=Kurumi Nara}} (born 1991), Japanese tennis player * {{ill|Rao Nara|en|Rao Nara|WD=Q16863396|lt=Rao Nara|1=Rao Nara}} (1420–1487), crown Prince of Nadol, India *{{Nihongo|{{ill|Setsuo Nara|en|Setsuo Nara|WD=Q11445421|lt=Setsuo Nara|1=Setsuo Nara}}|奈良 節雄||born 1936}}, Japanese basketball player * {{ill|Takeji Nara|en|Takeji Nara|WD=Q1129969|lt=Takeji Nara|1=Takeji Nara}} (1868–1962), general in the Imperial Japanese Army * {{ill|Tatsuki Nara|en|Tatsuki Nara|WD=Q7688283|lt=Tatsuki Nara|1=Tatsuki Nara}} (born 1993), Japanese footballer * {{ill|Tatunca Nara|en|Tatunca Nara|WD=Q121015|lt=Tatunca Nara|1=Tatunca Nara}} (born 1941), German-Brazilian jungle guide who invented the lost city of Akakor * {{ill|Tōru Nara|en|Tōru Nara|WD=Q7862714|lt=Tōru Nara|1=Tōru Nara}}, Japanese voice actor * {{ill|Wanda Nara|en|Wanda Nara|WD=Q7967127|lt=Wanda Nara|1=Wanda Nara}} (born 1986), Argentine media personality and football agent * {{ill|Yoshitomo Nara|en|Yoshitomo Nara|WD=Q2015324|lt=Yoshitomo Nara|1=Yoshitomo Nara}} (born 1959), Japanese artist * {{ill|Zaira Nara|en|Zaira Nara|WD=Q3574627|lt=Zaira Nara|1=Zaira Nara}} (born 1988), Argentine model and TV host * {{ill|Empress Xiaojingxian|en|Empress Xiaojingxian|WD=Q1036533|lt=Ula Nara Duoqimuli|1=Empress Xiaojingxian}}, Empress consort of Qing dynasty Yongzheng Emperor
== Arts and mythology == * [[:en:Nara (Arjuna)|Nara (Arjuna)]], Arjuna in his previous birth was Nara * ''{{ill|Nara (album)|en|Nara (album)|WD=Q131394713|lt=Nara (album)|1=Nara (album)}}'', by Emily Wurramara * {{ill|Nara (comics)|en|Nara (comics)|WD=Q17012003|lt=Nara (comics)|1=Nara (comics)}}, a fictional character from Marvel Comics * One of the twins {{ill|Nara-Narayana|en|Nara-Narayana|WD=Q2472959|lt=Nara-Narayana|1=Nara-Narayana}} in Hindu mythology * "Nara", song from the album ''Unearthed'' by {{ill|E.S.
